en.extract:
The Ranongga white-eye or splendid white-eye (Zosterops splendidus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Ranongga white-eye''' or '''splendid white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops splendidus''''') is a [[species]] of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]].<ref>{{cite web|title=Ranongga White-eye (Zosterops splendidus) - BirdLife species factsheet|url=http://datazone.birdlife.org/species/factsheet/22714180|website=datazone.birdlife.org|access-date=22 January 2017}}</ref> It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Solomon Islands]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
